title: QC/MultiQC + outlier + inclusion-list module
context: QC and sample governance (FastQC/MultiQC, library complexity, mapping rate, outlier detection) produce an auditable inclusion list for downstream DE (PLAN §3). Sample inclusion must be transparent and reproducible. Binding guardrails: open-access / aggregate / de-identified data only; controlled-access (dbGaP/EGA/biobanks) and identifiable patient data are out of scope; COSMIC/OncoKB/MSigDB-restricted are recipe-reference only; no clinical/diagnostic/prognostic/treatment language; research-only, not medical advice; provenance on every assertion.
objective: Add a QC module (FastQC/MultiQC aggregation, outlier detection, and a recorded sample inclusion/exclusion list) on top of the quantification pipeline.
acceptanceCriteria: MultiQC report aggregates per-sample QC (mapping rate, library complexity, duplication) for each dataset.
Outlier/low-quality samples are detected by documented criteria and an inclusion list is recorded.
Inclusion/exclusion decisions are reproducible and traceable to QC metrics.
Commit is DCO signed-off; no clinical interpretation of QC results.
output: A pull request adding the QC/MultiQC + outlier-detection + inclusion-list module.
